targets.expr:
sum by (node) (
  label_replace(
    container_memory_working_set_bytes{
      container!="",
      image!="",
      pod!="",
    },
    "node",
    "$1",
    "instance",
    "(.*)"
  )
)
/
sum by(node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory"})
sum by(namespace, pod, node, pod_ip) (kube_pod_info{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$nodes"})

panels.description: How close a pod is to their memory limit
panels.title: Top 10 Pod RAM Limit
